reviews.review_description: This is a garbage money game. The content in it is monotonous and boring. Every time you update a new map, the value expands. If you want to become stronger, you can only charge money, or do boring repetitive content all day long like you go to work. To put it bluntly, it is a numerical game, just a garbage recharge game that has the final say in game planning
Is this the 7th reincarnation of Galaxicity?
Game will not allow me to play as a ( guest) or create a login..

developer_response.body: We are very sorry that cause this problem，we have already improved and resolved this problem in new version .Hope you  can  upgrade  and enjoy the game again .

reviews.review_description: This VR social game has redefined how we connect and have fun in the virtual world. From the stunning visuals to the seamless social interaction, it's an unforgettable journey every time. Customize your avatar, embark on quests, or just hang out with friends—Dreamland VR is where dreams come true!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your praising，we will  working hard to make the game become better and solve the problem occurred.

reviews.review_description: The game might be fun, at least it looks like it has potential, but it lacks basic features like smooth rotation, speed of movement and voice chat? At keast I couldn't find any of the options and none of the players I've met in the game seem to hear or respond to me. It's free, but it still felt like a waste of time

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your suggestion. Currently, the voice function is only available to players from the same region, so many players from different regions cannot communicate with each other. We attach great importance to your suggestion and will gradually open the relevant functions in the next version. Thank you for your feedback.

reviews.review_description: Won't let me sign up for a account,  it keeps saying incorrect device code.

developer_response.body: Hello, we apologize for the issue. It was caused by reinstalling Dreamland, and we have resolve this issue in the new version. You can upgrad to solve this problem and wishing you a pleasant game!

reviews.review_description: funny

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your support. Have a pleasant game.

reviews.review_description: Dreamland has recently updated a new game Western Warriors. Although it is difficult, it is very challenging!

developer_response.body: oh, this is a new shooting game we have recently launched, and the difficulty is still very high. We hope you can pass it.

reviews.review_description:
For some reason when I’m trying to get into the game it just kicks me out and I can’t
 Play it can you please fix it I really want to play this

developer_response.body: Hi we have release the new version，hoping you can update ，we have already solve the problem occurred.Hoping you can have a nice experience

reviews.review_description: It seems like a VERY fun game and I've heard good things about it but I sadly cannot play games with snap turning.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your suggestion.We will improve the game aim this issue.And we update the game monthly ,please try it again when the new version  release .

reviews.review_description:
I've tried everything....seriously. Told numerous people about how great this is. I can't log in, and I registered w/my email. 4 days and counting, and after the response to my review. Idk...I log in...I'm in the lobby...interface is there, look on the rooms, nothing. Standard set up, every room listed, and no game is. I'm tired of looking. I'll give it a week? UPDATE: I think my problem is I signed up with my email. Had I stayed in guest mode, this might not be an issue. I wiped the game date, uninstalled, re-downloaded, and even changed my pw, and nothing works. I loved this game and I'm missing it. I'll get to Discord eventually, but I really don't see why this is such an issue. UPDATE- tried everything. Disord, won't allow me to accept invite on your link. Idk...I just wish I had never took the time to put in my email. Had I stayed a guest, I don't think this would be an issue. I even did a factory reset. I deleted the game permanently. I hope this game makes it. It's a great game, and I've enjoyed it, or else I wouldn't have gone to these lengths to try to play it again. Good luck to y'all! It has such possibilities! Movin on...
IT FINALLY WORKED!! SOO happy to be back in and under my email! SUCH a great game platform, and I've missed it! Gonna go play now, and thanks so much!

developer_response.body: We are very sorry for any inconvenience caused. If you encounter any problems, you can also contact us via email: lixin@zmvr.com You can also join our Discord. We are about to welcome a new version, and we wish you a happy time playing

reviews.review_description:
There are things avetars are doing that are not advertised. 
Is there a help site available ? 
I see for example avetars flying without having to use their power. 
For example the the vampire avetar you dont have to spin you can just stay in full avetar and fly. 
You are not a cloud with bats flying.
Fly without broom or without scateboard. 
Any ideas. 
Thank you. 
Great game.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. We have received the issue you pointed out! Let's take a look at how to transmit information about avatar flight to everyone and optimize related performance. Thank you very much!

reviews.review_description: What a nice place to meet up and spend time with old friends and new! A good selection of games,  from zombie shooter to flying, and dungeon crawling. I'm hoping for smooth turn in a future update,  but so far that hasn't really taken away from the immersionas long as I turn in real life lol. Devs, so far so good.  Keep up the updates please! I'm a fan!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your praising，we will Working hard to make the game better，and we will consider your suggestion to making you can  smooth turn in the game！Welcome to our Discord community：https://discord.com/invite/8CsK6gm2ys.

reviews.review_description: I really love this game.

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your love of Dreamland. Wishing you a pleasant gaming experience!

reviews.review_description: I love every single game mode. It’s very good. Also fun. I I rate it a 10 out of 10. very good social media. Keep up the good work.

developer_response.body: Oh！Thank you for praising！It’s our honor to won your loving！We will continue to exploring new games for players！

reviews.review_description: Kudos to the developers for the innovative and creative design of Dreamland. The landscapes, characters, and interactions showcase a level of imagination that sets this VR social game apart.

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your love of Dreamland. Wishing you a pleasant gaming experience!

reviews.review_description: This time, I finally remembered to comment. This game is really beyond my imagination. I have been playing it for two months now. Welcome to play with me~

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your love of Dreamland. Wishing you a pleasant gaming experience!

reviews.review_description: The intuitive controls make me forget I'm in a virtual space, allowing me to fully engage with the game. It's not just a game; it's a portal to endless possibilities. Thank you to the developers for creating this groundbreaking masterpiece. Virtual reality has never been this incredible!

developer_response.body: We are very pleased with your love and will continue to update our fun games in the future. Thank you for your support.

reviews.review_title: I’ve tried several times to install it
reviews.review_description: I’ve tried to uninstall and reinstall and get the latest version and still cannot install on my quest 2

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear that，you can open the document in the menu ， then  find the file ：document，after that please delete the document call .zmvr and the file with os format  .After that you can install the game.Our  Discord：https://discord.com/invite/8CsK6gm2ys,you can join in that community  ask us question and communicate with other player.

reviews.review_title: The multiplayer mode is a blast!
reviews.review_description: The game's interactive design is top-notch, making me feel like I'm truly exploring new adventures. An absolutely immersive experience!

developer_response.body: Hoping you can have an unforgettable experience in the VR  world  of the Dreamland,to exploring a new world that different with truly world
